title: Быт и каждый день
description: Фразы для дома, дел, семьи, расписания, покупок и обычного дня.

chunks.en: I need to do a few things.
examples: I need to do a few things before work.
I need to do a few things at home.

chunks.en: I have a lot to do today.
examples: I have a lot to do today, so I need a plan.
I have a lot to do today after work.
I'm running late, I'll be there in ten minutes.
Sorry, I'm running late.

chunks.en: I'll be there in ten minutes.
chunks.ru: Я буду там через десять минут.
examples: I'll be there in ten minutes, wait for me.
I'll be there in ten minutes if there is no traffic.
Can you remind me to call him?
Can you remind me to buy bread?
Don't forget to take your keys.
Don't forget to charge your phone.
I forgot to send the message.
I forgot to buy milk.
I need to pick up my son.
I need to pick up the order.
I need to drop off my son at school.
I need to drop off this package.

chunks.en: Can you take care of it?
examples: Can you take care of it today?
Can you take care of it while I am away?
I'll take care of it after lunch.
I'll take care of it today.
Let's do it later today.
Let's do it later when we have time.
Let's do it now and then relax.
Let's do it now before we forget.
I need some rest after work.
I need some rest before training.
I didn't sleep well last night.
I didn't sleep well, so I feel tired.
I feel better now after coffee.
I feel better now after a walk.
I'm tired, but I'm okay today.
I'm tired, but I'm okay after training.

chunks.en: What are your plans for today?
chunks.ru: Какие у тебя планы на сегодня?
examples: What are your plans for today after school?
What are your plans for today after work?
I need to clean up the kitchen.
I need to clean up before guests come.

chunks.en: Can you help me clean up?
examples: Can you help me clean up the room?
Can you help me clean up after dinner?
I'm going to cook dinner in an hour.
I'm going to cook dinner for the family.

chunks.en: What should we have for dinner?
examples: What should we have for dinner today?
What should we have for dinner tonight?
We are out of milk.
We are out of coffee.
I need to buy some food.
I need to buy a new notebook.

chunks.en: Can you send me the address?
examples: Can you send me the address in WhatsApp?
Can you send me the address, please?
I'm on my way home.
I'm on my way to the office.
I'm almost there, wait a minute.
I'm almost there now.
Can we talk later today?
Can we talk later when I am free?
I have to go now, see you later.
I have to go now, I am late.
See you later at home.
See you later today.

chunks.en: I need to charge my phone.
examples: I need to charge my phone before we leave.
I need to charge my phone, it is almost dead.
My battery is low, I need a charger.
My battery is low, I will call you later.
Can I use your charger for ten minutes?
Can I use your charger, please?
Let's make a plan for the weekend.
Let's make a plan for tomorrow.
We need to leave earlier tomorrow.
We need to leave earlier because of traffic.
